reviews.comment:
Agradable para hacer una parada y seguir adelante,los baños muy limpios,y las mesas bien alejadas para el distanciamiento!

(Translated by Google)
Nice place to stop and continue on your way, the restrooms are very clean, and the tables are well spaced for social distancing!

reviews.comment:
Nada de otro mundo, te la "venden" como un paraje obligado y no es más que otra yof con un poco de verde alrededor, la.parte de mercadito y comidas es muy chica

(Translated by Google)
Nothing special, they "sell" it to you as a must-see spot, but it's just another place with a bit of greenery around it; the market and food area is very small.

reviews.comment:
Ideal para cargar combustible (despreocuparse hasta fin del viaje), estirar piernas, baño e hidratación a la vuelta de un viaje CABA MDQ Miramar y viceversa

Ideal for refueling (don't worry until the end of your trip), stretching your legs, taking a shower and hydrating on the way back from a trip between CABA, MDQ, and Miramar and vice versa.
